description: Fol. 2r: Deed regarding alimony provided by a husband for his wife in Tyre, while he travels to Egypt. The husband will provide wheat, oil, fuel, cash and service to his wife. Location: Tyre or Tripoli, Lebanon. Dated: Tishrei 5863 AM = September/October 1102 CE. Hand of the same scribe as UPenn E 16516 (PGPID 2296).
description_he: שטר מזונות: בעל נוסע למצרים מתחייב לספק לאשתו בצור חיטה, שמן, דלק, מזומן ועבודת בית. תאריך: תשרי 5863 (1102).
